summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Criminal Appeal Case Management app. Fixed critical PDF export bug (reportlab style name conflict). All 29 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified - multi-file upload, PDF export, and Barrister View all working correctly.

fixed_issues.issue: PDF export returned 520 Internal Server Error due to reportlab style name conflict
fixed_issues.fix: Renamed custom styles from 'Title', 'Subtitle', 'BodyText' to 'ReportTitle', 'ReportSubtitle', 'ReportBodyText' to avoid conflict with default stylesheet

multi_file_upload.details: Upload dialog shows 'Files (select multiple)' with multiple attribute enabled on file input

pdf_export.details: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/{report_id}/export-pdf returns valid PDF with Grounds of Merit and Legal References

barrister_view.details: Prominently displays GROUNDS OF MERIT section with ground type, strength, description, and supporting evidence

document_upload_text_extraction.details: TXT files upload successfully with text extraction

report_generation.details: Quick Summary report generation works with AI (GPT-5.2)

grounds_of_merit_crud.details: Create, Read, Update, Delete operations all functional

notes_crud.details: Create, Read, Update, Delete, Pin/Unpin operations all functional

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed PDF export style name conflicts
seed_data_creation: Test case 'PDF Test Case' with document, ground of merit, and report created for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. PDF export bug was fixed by renaming reportlab styles. Test session token can be reused. Test data was cleaned up after testing.
critical_code_review_comments: PDF export endpoint now uses unique style names to avoid conflicts with reportlab's default stylesheet
